ACC_ACCOUNT.REP     |select M_LABEL_SUB, M_CLASS, M_MAPPING, M_LABEL  from TRN_ACA1_DBF where M__INTID_ = 'MsMlP60056'

ACC_DAILY_BAL.REP   |SELECT
ENTD.M_LABEL AS M_ENTITY,
BAL.M_EN_AMTC AS M_CR_BALANCE,
BAL.M_EN_AMTD AS M_DT_BALANCE,
BAL.M_EN_AMTN AS M_NETBALANCE,
BAL.M_EN_ACCOUNT AS M_ACCOUNT2,
ACA1.M_LABEL AS M_ACCOUNT, 
BAL.M_INSTRUMENT AS M_INSTRUMENT,
CURR.M_DSP_LABEL AS M_CURRENCY,
BAL.M_EN_DATE AS M_BAL_DATE,
PC.M_DATE AS M_SYS_DATE

FROM TRN_ACJS_DBF BAL, TRN_PC_DBF PC, TRN_ACA1_DBF ACA1, TRN_PLIN_DBF CURR, TRN_ENTD_DBF ENTD
WHERE 
CURR.M_ID=BAL.M_INSTRUMENT 
AND ACA1.M_REFERENCE = BAL.M_EN_ACCOUNT
AND ENTD.M_REF=BAL.M_ENTITY

ACC_DETAILS.REP     |select distinct M_CATEGORY0,M_DESC from TRN_ACA1_DBF
where TRIM(M_CATEGORY0) is not null and M__INTID_ = 'MsMlP60056' and M_CATEGORY0<>'96341'

ACC_ENT_FXCONV.REP  |SELECT M_NB AS M_NB,
    M_ORIG_NB AS M_ORIGIN_NB,
    CAST(M_CTR_RATE AS NUMBER(25,8)) AS M_CONV_RATE,
    M_CTR_ORIG_AMT AS M_ORIGIN_AMT,
    M_DATE AS M_CONV_DATE
FROM ACG_ENTRY_FX_CONV_DBF
WHERE M_DATE = @ReportingDate:D
ACC_RULES.REP       |select M_RULE_LB, M_RULE_NB from TRN_ACR1_DBF

ACC_SECURITIES.REP  |SELECT
M_SE_LABEL,
M_SE_D_LABEL,
M_SE_ISIN
FROM
SE_HEAD_DBF

ACT_JOBS.REP        |select 
A.M_IDJOB as M_IDJOB,
A.M_DATE as M_DATE,
A.M_TIME as M_TIME,
A.M_ENDTIME as M_ENDTIME,
A.M_OWNER as M_OWNER,
A.M_STATUS as M_STATUS,
A.M_BATCH as M_BATCH,
A.M_CTX as M_CTX,
A.M_REF_SET as M_REF_SET,
A.M_REF_BATCH as M_REF_BATCH,
A.M_PID as M_PID,
A.M_GROUP as M_GROUP,
B.M_FLTTEMP as M_FLTTEMP,
D.M_TEMPLATE as M_SCNTMPL,
D.M_PROCESS_NB as M_PROCESS_NB,
D.M_BATCH_SIZE as M_BATCH_SIZE,
D.M_RETRIES as M_RETRIES,
D.M_THRESHOLD as M_THRESHOLD,
C.M_CLASS as M_CLASS,
case 
	when E.M_OUTPUTTYP  = 0 then 'Viewer'
	when E.M_OUTPUTTYP  = 1 then 'File'
	when E.M_OUTPUTTYP = 2 then 'SOAP'
	when E.M_OUTPUTTYP = 3 then 'Table'
	when E.M_OUTPUTTYP = 4 then 'Excel'
	when E.M_OUTPUTTYP = 5 then 'CSV'
	when E.M_OUTPUTTYP  =6 then 'PDF'
	else 'None' 
end as M_OUTPUTTYPE

from ACT_JOB_DBF A
  left join ACT_SET_DBF B on A.M_REF_SET = B.M_REF
  left join DAPFILTER_DBF C  on B.M_FLTTEMP = C.M_LABEL and C.M_LABEL <> ''
  left join SCANNERCFG_DBF D on B.M_SCNTMPL = D.M_REFERENCE
  left join (select max(M_OUTPUTTYP) as M_OUTPUTTYP,M_IDJOB from ACT_JOBEXT_DBF group by M_IDJOB) E on A.M_IDJOB = E.M_IDJOB
 where A.M_DATE>=@Start_date:D and A.M_DATE<= @End_date:D

ALTERNATE_ID.REP    |select
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_ALT as M_ALT_ID,
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_ASYS as M_ALT_SYS, 
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_ATYP as M_ALT_TYPE,
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_DESC as M_LABEL,    
'party' as M_TYPE,
CPDF.M_ID as M_ID , 
CPDF.M_DSP_LABEL as M_DSP_LABEL
from KEYMAP_STC_DBF, CLASS_MAPPING_DBF, TRN_CPDF_DBF CPDF
where KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_CLASS=CLASS_MAPPING_DBF.M_ID 
and KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_DESC = CPDF.M_LABEL
and CLASS_MAPPING_DBF.M_NAME like 'mxStaticsOrganizationIPARTY%'

union

select 
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_ALT as M_ALT_ID, 
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_ASYS as M_ALT_SYS,
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_ATYP as M_ALT_TYPE,
KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_DESC as M_LABEL,
'portfolio' as M_TYPE,
null as M_ID,
'' as M_DSP_LABEL
from KEYMAP_STC_DBF, CLASS_MAPPING_DBF
where KEYMAP_STC_DBF.M_OBJ_CLASS=CLASS_MAPPING_DBF.M_ID 
and CLASS_MAPPING_DBF.M_NAME like 'mxStaticsOrganizationIPORTFOLIO%'

AU_DMTABLE.REP      |-- AU_DMTABLE_REP definition
-- This table outputs the datamart tables configuration
select 
case DM.M_MUREX
when 0 then 'Client'
when 1 then 'Murex' end as M_OWNER,
-- Datamart table name
DM.M_LABEL as M_LABEL,
-- Datamart table description
DM.M_DESC as M_DESC,
-- Datamart table number of fields
cast(NUMBER_FIELDS.NUMBER_F as numeric(3,0)) as M_NUMBER_F,
-- Datamart table source type
case DM.M_TYPE
when 0 then 'Dynamic Table'
when 1 then 'Data Dictionary'
when 4 then 'SQL' end as M_SRC_TYPE,
-- Dynamic table source owner
case DYN_SRC.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE
when 0 then 'Murex'
when 1 then 'Murex Additional'
when 2 then 'User'
when 3 then 'User Additional' end as M_D_OWNER,
-- Dynamic table source name
rtrim(DYN_SRC.M_DYN_TABLE) as M_D_TABLE,
-- Datamart table field name
COL.M_LABEL as M_FLD_LABEL,
-- Dynamic table source field name
COL.M_RELATED_DATA as M_DFLD_LABEL,
-- Datamart table field type
case COL.M_TYPE 
when 65 then 'American'
when 67 then 'Char'
when 68 then 'Date'
when 70 then 'Numeric'
when 71 then 'Numeric'
when 73 then 'Numeric'
when 78 then 'Numeric'
when 87 then 'Varchar'
else '-' end as M_DMFLD_TYPE,
rtrim(cast(COL.M_MAX_LENGTH as char(4))) as M_MAX_LENGTH,
rtrim(cast(COL.M_DECIMAL as char(2))) as M_DECIMAL,

-- Number of Datamart tables having the same dynamic table as datasource
coalesce(DM_TABLE_COUNT.DM_TABLE_SAME_SOURCE,0) as M_DM_SAME
from
RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_DBF DM
left outer join  RPO_DMSETUP_DYN_TABLE_DBF DYN_SRC on (DM.M_REFERENCE=DYN_SRC.M_REFERENCE)
left outer join (select count(*) as NUMBER_F, M_RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_REF from RPO_DMSETUP_COLUMN_DBF where M_LABEL<>'MX_REF_JOB' and M_LABEL<>'REF_DATA' and M_LABEL<>'IDENTITY' and M_LABEL<>'TIMESTAMP' group by M_RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_REF) NUMBER_FIELDS on (NUMBER_FIELDS.M_RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_REF=DM.M_REFERENCE) 
left outer join (select * from RPO_DMSETUP_COLUMN_DBF where M_LABEL<>'MX_REF_JOB' and M_LABEL<>'REF_DATA' and M_LABEL<>'IDENTITY' and M_LABEL<>'TIMESTAMP') COL on (COL.M_RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_REF=DM.M_REFERENCE) 
-- This last outer join to get for each dynamic table the number of datamart tables having this dynamic table as datasource
left outer join (select count(*) as DM_TABLE_SAME_SOURCE, DM_TABLE_SOURCE.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE as DYN_DIR_TYPE, DM_TABLE_SOURCE.M_DYN_TABLE as DYN_LABEL from (
					select
					DM_TABLE.M_LABEL, DYN_SRC.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE, DYN_SRC.M_DYN_TABLE
					from RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_DBF DM_TABLE, RPO_DMSETUP_DYN_TABLE_DBF DYN_SRC
where DM_TABLE.M_REFERENCE=DYN_SRC.M_REFERENCE and DM_TABLE.M_TYPE=0) DM_TABLE_SOURCE
group by M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE, M_DYN_TABLE) DM_TABLE_COUNT on (DM_TABLE_COUNT.DYN_DIR_TYPE=DYN_SRC.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE and DM_TABLE_COUNT.DYN_LABEL=DYN_SRC.M_DYN_TABLE)

AU_DYNTABLE.REP     |-- AU_DYNTABLE_REP dynamic table definition
-- This table stores the dynamic tables definition and configuration
-- 1 line per dynamic table
select 
-- Dynamic table owner
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.DYN_TABLE_OWNER as M_OWNER,
-- Dynamic table label
rtrim(DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.DYN_TABLE_LABEL) as M_LABEL,
-- Consolidated view flag ticked
case DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.CNS_FLAG
when 0 then 'No'
when 1 then 'Yes' end as M_CNS_F,
-- Built on flag
case DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.BUILT_ON
when 0 then 'Detailed DBF'
when 1 then 'Consolidated DBF'
when 2 then 'Stored results'
else 'N/A' end as M_BUILT_ON_F,
-- The flag that takes the value Yes if the dynamic table is defined with a postfilter and No otherwise
case coalesce(DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.POST_FILTER_F,'Empty')
when 'Empty' then 'No'
else 'Yes' end as M_POST_F,
case DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.M_CLASS_TYPE
when 0 then 'Transaction'
when 1 then 'Accounting'
            when 2 then 'Copy creation'
            when 3 then 'External'
            when 4 then 'Payment'
            when 5 then 'Definition report'
            when 6 then 'Accounting (reporting)'
            when 7 then 'Cash balances'            
            when 9 then 'PLVar'
            when 10 then 'Java plugin'
            when 11 then 'Dictionary engine'
            when 12 then 'Theta analysis'
            when 13 then 'VaR'
            when 14 then 'Simulation PLE'
            when 15 then 'PLVar PLE'
            when 16 then 'Deliverable cash'
            when 17 then 'DLV_NOSTRO_CASH'
            when 18 then 'ODR_ENGINE'
            when 19 then 'Trade Version Audit'
            when 20 then 'Navigation template'
            when 21 then 'LRB Request'
            when 22 then 'STP Rights'
            when 23 then 'STP RIGHTS AUDIT'
            when 24 then 'Risk Matrix'
			-- for previous version, Hedge XXX were some class type, we keep for retro compatibility the value 25, 26, 27 and 28
			when 25 then 'Hedge config'
			when 26 then 'Hedge trade'
			when 27 then 'Hedge effectiveness'
			when 28 then 'Hedge measurement'
			when 29 then 'Cash position statements'
			when 30 then 'Securities position statements'
			when 31 then 'Liquidation position statements'			
			when 32 then 'Classification tree'
			when 33 then 'Deliverable physical'
			when 34 then 'VAR (datasource)'
			when 35 then 'Order'
			when 36 then 'SIMSRV_CONFIG'
			when 37 then 'Liquidation inventory statements'
			when 38 then 'Corporate actions position statements'
			when 39 then 'Accounting inventory entries'
            when 40 then 'ACG inventory balances'
			when 41 then 'Market risk aggregation'
            when 42 then 'Settlement management statements in liquidation'
			when 43 then 'Var (scenario)'
			when 44 then 'LiveBook'
			when 45 then 'PostTrade Workflow Audit'
			when 46 then 'Corporate actions static data'
            when 47 then 'Hedge'
			when 48 then 'SIMULATION_BY_GTYPE (PL consolidated)'
			when 49 then 'CVA'
			when 50 then 'Inventory statements'
            when 51 then 'Collateral exchange'
			when 52 then 'Transfer'
            when 53 then 'Accounting audit'
			when 54 then 'Collateral inventory'
			when 55 then 'Interest'
			when 57 then 'Simulation sample - internal use for API'
			when 58 then 'Copy creation sample - internal use for API'
			when 59 then 'Risk Based PL'
			when 60 then 'PRM Balance'
			when 61 then 'Copy creation (based on API)'
			when 62 then 'LRB'
			when 63 then 'Limit Compliance (Rule)'
			when 64 then 'Compliance (Rule)'
			when 65 then 'Collateral asset eligibility'
			when 66 then 'Reporting Audit'
			when 67 then 'Market risk aggregation (based on the API)'
			when 68 then 'Compliance Audit'
			when 69 then 'Compliance Evaluation'
			when 70 then 'Compliance evaluation'
			when 71 then 'Limit Compliance audit'
			when 72 then 'Collateral inventory'
            when 73 then 'Market Risk Limit Audit'
            when 74 then 'Collateral interest'
            when 75 then 'Counterparty'
            when 76 then 'Portfolio'
            when 77 then 'Excess Management'
            when 78 then 'Forwards viewer'
            when 81 then 'Simulation'
			else 'Not Applicable' end as M_CLASS_TYPE,
case DATE_COMP0
when 0 then 'No Selection' 
when 1 then 'Today' 
when 2 then 'Yesterday' 
when 3 then 'Origin (Monthly)' 
when 4 then 'Date minus' 
when 5 then 'Inception' 
when 6 then 'Historical date' 
when 7 then 'User defined' 
when 8 then 'Accounting date' 
when 9 then 'Relative previous' 
when 10 then 'Relative next' 
when 11 then 'Origin (Simul)'
when 12 then 'Origin (Daily)' 
when 13 then 'Origin (Yearly)' 
when 14 then 'Trading date' 
when 15 then 'Date plus'
when 16 then 'Trading Yesterday' 
when 17 then 'P&L date' 
when 18 then 'P&L Yesterday'  
when 19 then 'Date Shifter'
when 23 then 'Reporting Date'
when 24 then 'Reporting Shifter Date'
else ' ' end as M_COMP_DATE0,
case DATE_COMP1
when 0 then 'No Selection' 
when 1 then 'Today' 
when 2 then 'Yesterday' 
when 3 then 'Origin (Monthly)' 
when 4 then 'Date minus' 
when 5 then 'Inception' 
when 6 then 'Historical date' 
when 7 then 'User defined' 
when 8 then 'Accounting date' 
when 9 then 'Relative previous' 
when 10 then 'Relative next' 
when 11 then 'Origin (Simul)'
when 12 then 'Origin (Daily)' 
when 13 then 'Origin (Yearly)' 
when 14 then 'Trading date' 
when 15 then 'Date plus'
when 16 then 'Trading Yesterday' 
when 17 then 'P&L date' 
when 18 then 'P&L Yesterday'  
when 19 then 'Date Shifter'
when 23 then 'Reporting Date'
when 24 then 'Reporting Shifter Date'
else ' ' end as M_COMP_DATE1,
case DATE_COMP2
when 0 then 'No Selection' 
when 1 then 'Today' 
when 2 then 'Yesterday' 
when 3 then 'Origin (Monthly)' 
when 4 then 'Date minus' 
when 5 then 'Inception' 
when 6 then 'Historical date' 
when 7 then 'User defined' 
when 8 then 'Accounting date' 
when 9 then 'Relative previous' 
when 10 then 'Relative next' 
when 11 then 'Origin (Simul)'
when 12 then 'Origin (Daily)' 
when 13 then 'Origin (Yearly)' 
when 14 then 'Trading date' 
when 15 then 'Date plus'
when 16 then 'Trading Yesterday' 
when 17 then 'P&L date' 
when 18 then 'P&L Yesterday'  
when 19 then 'Date Shifter'
when 23 then 'Reporting Date'
when 24 then 'Reporting Shifter Date'
else ' ' end as M_COMP_DATE2,
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.M_DESC as M_DESC,
-- the compute sensitivity flag is only available for transaction dynamic table (class type=0).
-- If not transaction, then automatically set to 0
case DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.M_CLASS_TYPE
when 0 then DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.COMPUTE_SENSI_F
else 0 end as M_SENSI_F,
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.M_CLASS as M_CRE_CLASS,
-- The flag M_POST_SPE_F takes the value Yes if the dynamic table is defined with a postfilter containing RQWHERE or TBLFIELD
case coalesce(DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.POST_F_SPE_F,'Empty')
when 'Empty' then 'No'
else 'Yes' end as M_POST_SPE_F,
-- The flag M_PRE_SPE_F takes the value Yes if the dynamic table is defined with a prefilter expression containing RQWHERE or TBLFIELD
case coalesce(DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.PRE_SPE_F,'Empty')
when 'Empty' then 'No'
else 'Yes' end as M_PRE_SPE_F
from
(select
'Murex' as DYN_TABLE_OWNER,
DYN1.M_CREATION as DYN_TABLE_LABEL,
DYN1.M_F_CNSVIEW as CNS_FLAG,
DYN1.M_F_SELPFL as BUILT_ON,
POST1.M_CREATION as POST_FILTER_F,
DYN1.M_CLASS_TYPE,
DYN1.M_CLASS,
case DYN1.M_F_CMPNO
-- disable compute ticked then compute sensitivities is not activated by definition
when 1 then 0
else DYN1.M_F_SVCMP end as COMPUTE_SENSI_F,
DYN1.M_DT_TYPE0 as DATE_COMP0,
DYN1.M_DT_TYPE1 as DATE_COMP1,
DYN1.M_DT_TYPE2 as DATE_COMP2,
DYN1.M_DESC,
POST_DEF1.M_CREATION as POST_F_SPE_F,
PRE_DEF1.M_CREATION as PRE_SPE_F
from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN1 left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNO_DBF where M_USAGE=2) POST1 on (POST1.M_CREATION=DYN1.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE=2) POST_DEF1 on (POST_DEF1.M_CREATION=DYN1.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE in (0,1)) PRE_DEF1 on (PRE_DEF1.M_CREATION=DYN1.M_CREATION)
union all
select
'User' as DYN_TABLE_OWNER,
DYN2.M_CREATION as DYN_TABLE_LABEL,
DYN2.M_F_CNSVIEW as CNS_FLAG,
DYN2.M_F_SELPFL as BUILT_ON,
POST2.M_CREATION as POST_FILTER_F,
DYN2.M_CLASS_TYPE,
DYN2.M_CLASS,
case DYN2.M_F_CMPNO
-- disable compute ticked then compute sensitivities is not activated by definition
when 1 then 0
else DYN2.M_F_SVCMP end as COMPUTE_SENSI_F,
DYN2.M_DT_TYPE0 as DATE_COMP0,
DYN2.M_DT_TYPE1 as DATE_COMP1,
DYN2.M_DT_TYPE2 as DATE_COMP2,
DYN2.M_DESC,
POST_DEF2.M_CREATION as POST_F_SPE_F,
PRE_DEF2.M_CREATION as PRE_SPE_F
from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN2 left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNO_DBF where M_USAGE=2) POST2 on (POST2.M_CREATION=DYN2.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE=2) POST_DEF2 on (POST_DEF2.M_CREATION=DYN2.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE in (0,1)) PRE_DEF2 on (PRE_DEF2.M_CREATION=DYN2.M_CREATION)
union all
select
'Murex Additional' as DYN_TABLE_OWNER,
DYN3.M_CREATION as DYN_TABLE_LABEL,
DYN3.M_F_CNSVIEW as CNS_FLAG,
DYN3.M_F_SELPFL as BUILT_ON,
POST3.M_CREATION as POST_FILTER_F,
DYN3.M_CLASS_TYPE,
DYN3.M_CLASS,
case DYN3.M_F_CMPNO
-- disable compute ticked then compute sensitivities is not activated by definition
when 1 then 0
else DYN3.M_F_SVCMP end as COMPUTE_SENSI_F,
DYN3.M_DT_TYPE0 as DATE_COMP0,
DYN3.M_DT_TYPE1 as DATE_COMP1,
DYN3.M_DT_TYPE2 as DATE_COMP2,
DYN3.M_DESC,
POST_DEF3.M_CREATION as POST_F_SPE_F,
PRE_DEF3.M_CREATION as PRE_SPE_F
from DYNDBF3#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN3 left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF3#TRN_DYNO_DBF where M_USAGE=2) POST3 on (POST3.M_CREATION=DYN3.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF3#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE=2) POST_DEF3 on (POST_DEF3.M_CREATION=DYN3.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE in (0,1)) PRE_DEF3 on (PRE_DEF3.M_CREATION=DYN3.M_CREATION)
union all
select
'User Additional' as DYN_TABLE_OWNER,
DYN4.M_CREATION as DYN_TABLE_LABEL,
DYN4.M_F_CNSVIEW as CNS_FLAG,
DYN4.M_F_SELPFL as BUILT_ON,
POST4.M_CREATION as POST_FILTER_F,
DYN4.M_CLASS_TYPE,
DYN4.M_CLASS,
case DYN4.M_F_CMPNO
-- disable compute ticked then compute sensitivities is not activated by definition
when 1 then 0
else DYN4.M_F_SVCMP end as COMPUTE_SENSI_F,
DYN4.M_DT_TYPE0 as DATE_COMP0,
DYN4.M_DT_TYPE1 as DATE_COMP1,
DYN4.M_DT_TYPE2 as DATE_COMP2,
DYN4.M_DESC,
POST_DEF4.M_CREATION as POST_F_SPE_F,
PRE_DEF4.M_CREATION as PRE_SPE_F
from DYNDBF4#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN4 left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF4#TRN_DYNO_DBF where M_USAGE=2) POST4 on (POST4.M_CREATION=DYN4.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF4#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE=2) POST_DEF4 on (POST_DEF4.M_CREATION=DYN4.M_CREATION) left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNO_DBF where (M_FORMULA like '%RQWHERE%' or M_FORMULA like '%TBLFIELD%') and M_USAGE in (0,1)) PRE_DEF4 on (PRE_DEF4.M_CREATION=DYN4.M_CREATION)
) DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION

AU_DYNTABLE_FLDS.REP|-- AU_DYNTABLE_FLDS_REP datamart table definition
-- This table stores the dynamic tables native and horizontal fields
select 
-- Dynamic table owner
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.DYN_TABLE_OWNER as M_OWNER,
-- Dynamic table label
rtrim(DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.M_CREATION) as M_LABEL,
-- The type of the field, Native or Horizontal
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.FIELD_TYPE as M_FLD_TYPE,
-- The name of the field
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.FIELD_LABEL as M_FLD_LABEL,
-- the description of the field
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.M_DUP_DESC as M_FLD_DESC,
-- the horizontal field formula
DYN_TABLE_DEFINITION.FIELD_FORMULA as M_HF_FORMULA
from
(select
'Murex' as DYN_TABLE_OWNER,
DYN_FIELDS1.FIELD_TYPE as FIELD_TYPE,
DYN_FIELDS1.M_FLD_LABEL as FIELD_LABEL,
DYN_FIELDS1.FIELD_FORMULA,
DYN_FIELDS1.M_CREATION,
DYN_FIELDS1.M_DUP_DESC
from  (select 'Native' as FIELD_TYPE,M_FLD_LABEL, M_CREATION, '' as FIELD_FORMULA, '' as M_DUP_DESC  from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNF_DBF 
       union all 
       select 'Horizontal' as FIELD_TYPE,M_DUP_LABEL as M_FLD_LABEL, M_CREATION,rtrim(M_DUP_DEF0) as FIELD_FORMULA, M_DUP_DESC from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNU_DBF  
       ) DYN_FIELDS1 
union all
select
'User' as DYN_TABLE_OWNER,
DYN_FIELDS2.FIELD_TYPE as FIELD_TYPE,
DYN_FIELDS2.M_FLD_LABEL as FIELD_LABEL,
DYN_FIELDS2.FIELD_FORMULA,
DYN_FIELDS2.M_CREATION,
DYN_FIELDS2.M_DUP_DESC
from  (select 'Native' as FIELD_TYPE,M_FLD_LABEL, M_CREATION, '' as FIELD_FORMULA, '' as M_DUP_DESC  from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNF_DBF 
       union all 
       select 'Horizontal' as FIELD_TYPE,M_DUP_LABEL as M_FLD_LABEL, M_CREATION,rtrim(M_DUP_DEF0) as FIELD_FORMULA, M_DUP_DESC from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNU_DBF
       ) DYN_FIELDS2 
union all
select
'Murex Additional' as DYN_TABLE_OWNER,
DYN_FIELDS3.FIELD_TYPE as FIELD_TYPE,
DYN_FIELDS3.M_FLD_LABEL as FIELD_LABEL,
DYN_FIELDS3.FIELD_FORMULA,
DYN_FIELDS3.M_CREATION,

DYN_FIELDS4.FIELD_FORMULA,
DYN_FIELDS4.M_CREATION,
DYN_FIELDS4.M_DUP_DESC
from (select 'Native' as FIELD_TYPE,M_FLD_LABEL, M_CREATION, '' as FIELD_FORMULA, '' as M_DUP_DESC  from DYNDBF4#TRN_DYNF_DBF

AU_EXCL_ITEMS.REP   |-- SQL query to retrieve the datamodel for exclusion items
select
EXCL_ITEM.M_LABEL as M_ITEM, -- Excluded item label --
cast(DM_OBJ_DEF.M_TYPE as numeric(2)) as M_OBJ_TYPE, -- Object type ---
cast(EXCL_LIST.M_REFERENCE as numeric(10)) as M_LIST_REF, -- Excluded list reference ---
EXCL_LIST.M_LABEL as M_EXCL_LIST, -- Excluded list label ---
DM_OBJ_DEF.M_LABEL as M_OBJ_LBL, -- Label of excluded object ---
DM_OBJ_DEF.M_DESC as M_OBJ_DES, -- Object description ---
EXCL_LIST.M_DESCRIPTION as M_LIST_DESC, -- Exclusion list description
AUDIT_TRADE_EXCL.M_USER as M_USER_TRADE, -- The user adding the trade in the list
AUDIT_TRADE_EXCL.M_CMP_DATE as M_DATE_TRADE -- The computer date when the trade has been added in the list
from 
DM_EXCL_LIST_DBF 	EXCL_LIST -- Containing defined lists---
left outer join DM_EXCL_SETLIST_DBF SETLIST on EXCL_LIST.M_REFERENCE=SETLIST.M_LIST_REF-- Containing the mapping between batches and lists---
left outer join ACT_SET_DBF 	DM_OBJ_DEF 	on	SETLIST.M_SET_REF = DM_OBJ_DEF.M_REF-- Containing datamart object definition--
left outer join DM_EXCL_ITEM_DBF 	EXCL_ITEM on EXCL_ITEM.M_LIST_REF = EXCL_LIST.M_REFERENCE-- Excluded items ---
-- this join to get the user and the computing date when the trade has been added to the list
left outer join (select M_USER, M_CMP_DATE, M_AFTER, M_LIST_REF from DM_AUDIT_EXCL_LIST_DBF AUDIT_EXCL where M_OBJECT='trade' and 
M_REFERENCE=(select max(M_REFERENCE) from DM_AUDIT_EXCL_LIST_DBF AUDIT_EXCL_BIS where AUDIT_EXCL_BIS.M_LIST_REF=AUDIT_EXCL.M_LIST_REF and AUDIT_EXCL_BIS.M_AFTER=AUDIT_EXCL.M_AFTER)) AUDIT_TRADE_EXCL on 
(AUDIT_TRADE_EXCL.M_AFTER=EXCL_ITEM.M_LABEL and AUDIT_TRADE_EXCL.M_LIST_REF=EXCL_LIST.M_REFERENCE)

AU_INDEX.REP        |select
    -- Object reference
    AUDINFO.M_OBJ_REF as M_OBJ_REF,
	-- Class id
    AUDINFO.M_CLASSID as M_CLASSID,
	-- Audit timestamp
   CAST(AUDINFO.M__DT_TS as VARCHAR(26)) as M_AUD_TIME,
	-- Audit action
	case
		when AUDINFO.M_ACTION=1 then 'Insert'
		when AUDINFO.M_ACTION=2 then 'Modify'
		else cast(AUDINFO.M_ACTION as char(6)) -- there should not be others
	end as M_AUD_ACT,
	-- Audit user
	CONN.M_USER_NAME as M_AUD_USER,
	-- Audit group
	CONN.M_GROUP_NAME as M_AUD_GRP,
	-- Audit client machine
	CONN.M_STAT_NAME as M_AUD_CL_MAC,
	-- Audit client ip
	CONN.M_STAT_IP as M_AUD_CL_IP	
from
    STAT_AUD_DBF AUDINFO 
	left join MX_USER_CONNECTION_DBF CONN on AUDINFO.M_CON_ID=CONN.M_REFERENCE

AU_REPCONF.REP      |-- AU_REPCONF_REP
-- This table stores the configuration from the processing script to the dynamic table source of the datamart tables.
-- The entry points are the feeders, datamart extractions and stored procedures stored in ACT_BAT_DBF.
 
select 
PS.M_NAME as M_PS_LABEL,
BATCH_NAME.M_LABEL as M_BATCH_LBL,
BATCH_NAME.M_DESC as M_BATCH_DESC,
case BATCH_NAME.M_TYPE
when 1 then 'Batch of feeders'
when 2 then 'Batch of extractions'
when 3 then 'Batch of stored procedures'
end as M_BATCH_TYPE,
case BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP 
when 'Y' then 'Yes'
when 'N' then 'No'
end as M_DATA_PRE_F,
case
when BATCH_NAME.M_TYPE=3 then 'N/A' 
else coalesce(BATCH_NAME.M_TAGDATA,'') end as M_LBL_DATA,
-- meaningless to have historization mode when data are precomputed
case BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP
when 'Y' then 'N/A'
else case BATCH_NAME.M_DATAHIS
     when 0 then 'One dataset'
     when 1 then 'One dataset per day'
     when 2 then 'One dataset per run'
     else null end
end as M_HIS_MODE,
case BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP
when 'Y' then 'N/A'
else coalesce(BATCH_NAME.M_FLTTEMP,'') end as M_GLOB_F_LBL,
case BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP
when 'Y' then 'N/A'
else
	-- We retrieve computing date 0
	case COMP_DATE0.M_TYPE
	when 0 then 'No Selection' 
	when 1 then 'Today' 
	when 2 then 'Yesterday' 
	when 3 then 'Origin (Monthly)' 
	when 4 then 'Date minus' 
	when 5 then 'Inception' 
	when 6 then 'Historical date' 
	when 7 then 'User defined' 
	when 8 then 'Accounting date' 
	when 9 then 'Relative previous' 
	when 10 then 'Relative next' 
	when 11 then 'Origin (Simul)'
	when 12 then 'Origin (Daily)' 
	when 13 then 'Origin (Yearly)' 
	when 14 then 'Trading date' 
	when 15 then 'Date plus'
	when 16 then 'Trading Yesterday' 
	when 17 then 'P&L date' 
	when 18 then 'P&L Yesterday'  
	when 19 then 'Date Shifter'
	when 23 then 'Reporting Date'
	when 24 then 'Reporting Shifter Date'
	else '' end
end	as M_COMP_DATE0,
-- We retrieve computing date 1
case BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP
when 'Y' then 'N/A'
else
	-- We retrieve computing date 0
	case COMP_DATE1.M_TYPE
	when 0 then 'No Selection' 
	when 1 then 'Today' 
	when 2 then 'Yesterday' 
	when 3 then 'Origin (Monthly)' 
	when 4 then 'Date minus' 
	when 5 then 'Inception' 
	when 6 then 'Historical date' 
	when 7 then 'User defined' 
	when 8 then 'Accounting date' 
	when 9 then 'Relative previous' 
	when 10 then 'Relative next' 
	when 11 then 'Origin (Simul)'
	when 12 then 'Origin (Daily)' 
	when 13 then 'Origin (Yearly)' 
	when 14 then 'Trading date' 
	when 15 then 'Date plus'
	when 16 then 'Trading Yesterday' 
	when 17 then 'P&L date' 
	when 18 then 'P&L Yesterday'  
	when 19 then 'Date Shifter'
	when 23 then 'Reporting Date'
	when 24 then 'Reporting Shifter Date'
	else '' end
end	as M_COMP_DATE1,
-- We retrieve computing date 2
case BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP
when 'Y' then 'N/A'
else
	-- We retrieve computing date 2
	case COMP_DATE2.M_TYPE
	when 0 then 'No Selection' 
	when 1 then 'Today' 
	when 2 then 'Yesterday' 
	when 3 then 'Origin (Monthly)' 
	when 4 then 'Date minus' 
	when 5 then 'Inception' 
	when 6 then 'Historical date' 
	when 7 then 'User defined' 
	when 8 then 'Accounting date' 
	when 9 then 'Relative previous' 
	when 10 then 'Relative next' 
	when 11 then 'Origin (Simul)'
	when 12 then 'Origin (Daily)' 
	when 13 then 'Origin (Yearly)' 
	when 14 then 'Trading date' 
	when 15 then 'Date plus'
	when 16 then 'Trading Yesterday' 
	when 17 then 'P&L date' 
	when 18 then 'P&L Yesterday'  
	when 19 then 'Date Shifter'
	when 23 then 'Reporting Date'
	when 24 then 'Reporting Shifter Date'
	else '' end
end	as M_COMP_DATE2,
-- We count the number of batch of feeders having the same label of data but with different historization mode
case BATCH_NAME.M_TYPE
-- the object is a batch of feeders
when 1 then 
    case BATCH_NAME.M_DATAHIS
    -- the batch is in mode one data set
    when 0 then HISMODE1.NUMBER_BATCH
    -- the batch is in mode one data set per day
    when 1 then HISMODE0.NUMBER_BATCH
    else 0 end
else 0 end as M_NUM_H_MODE,
case 
-- If data are precomputed or it is a batch of stored procedure, no scanner template
when (BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP='Y' or BATCH_NAME.M_TYPE=3) then 'N/A'
else coalesce(SCANNER.M_TEMPLATE,'') end as M_SCAN_TMPL,
case BAT.M_EXECTX
when 5 then 'Feeder'
when 7 then 'Extraction'
when 8 then 'Stored procedure'
end as M_ITD_TYPE,
case BAT.M_CATEG
when 0 then ''
when 1 then 'accounting'
when 2 then 'audit'
when 3 then 'cash_management'
when 4 then 'credit_risk'
when 5 then 'euro'
when 6 then 'fixing'
when 7 then 'security_mngmt'
when 8 then 'market_param'
when 9 then 'market_risk'
when 10 then 'open_position'
when 11 then 'P&L'
when 12 then 'payment_module'
when 13 then 'regulatory'
when 14 then 'static_tables'
when 15 then 'risk_matrix'
else CATEG.M_LABEL end as M_ITD_C,
BAT.M_LABEL as M_ITD_LBL,
BAT.M_DESC as M_ITD_DESC,
ACT_DYN.M_OUTPUT as M_DM_LABEL,
case DM.M_MUREX
when 0 then 'Client'
when 1 then 'Murex' end as M_DM_OWNER,
-- Number of Datamart tables configured in the ITD object
/*
case BAT.M_EXECTX
when 5 then NUM_TABLES.NUM_DM_TABLE
else 0 end as M_NUM_TABLES,*/
cast(NUM_TABLES.NUM_DM_TABLE as numeric(2,0)) as M_NUM_TABLES, 
-- Dynamic table source owner
case DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE
when 0 then 'Murex'
when 1 then 'Murex Additional'
when 2 then 'User'
when 3 then 'User Additional' end as M_DYN_OWNER,
case DM.M_TYPE
when 0 then rtrim(DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
else 'Not Applicable' end as M_DYN_LABEL,
-- Filter class
FILTER.M_CLASS as M_FILTER_C,
-- Number of different historization mode configured for this label of data. Relevant for batch of feeders only
cast(NUMBER_HIS_MODE.NUMBER_DIF_HIS_MODE as numeric(1,0))  as M_NUM_D_MODE,
-- If the batch is configured to compute data with real time market data, the flag will take the value Yes and No otherwise
case
when BATCH_NAME.M_DATACOMP='Y' then 'N/A' 
when (coalesce(rtrim(COMP_DATE0.M_MDCS_SETT),'No')='connected' or coalesce(rtrim(COMP_DATE1.M_MDCS_SETT),'No')='connected' or coalesce(rtrim(COMP_DATE2.M_MDCS_SETT),'No')='connected')
then 'Yes'
else 'No' end as M_REAL_TIME
-- ACT_BAT_DBF contains information about the intraday reporting objects (extractions, feeders, stored procedures)
from ACT_BAT_DBF BAT 
-- ACT_DYN_DBF contains information about reporting objects (feeders, extractions or stored procedures) references in the batches 
left outer join ACT_DYN_DBF ACT_DYN on (BAT.M_REF=ACT_DYN.M_REF)
-- ACT_SETREP_DBF contains batches configuration of execution 
left outer join ACT_SETREP_DBF BATCH_DEF on (BATCH_DEF.M_REFBAT=BAT.M_REF)
-- ACT_SET_DBF contains batches main screen configuration
left outer join ACT_SET_DBF BATCH_NAME on (BATCH_NAME.M_REF=BATCH_DEF.M_REFSET)
-- careful rtrim is not null oracle specific
left outer join DAPFILTER_DBF FILTER on (FILTER.M_LABEL=BATCH_NAME.M_FLTTEMP and rtrim(BATCH_NAME.M_FLTTEMP) is not null)
left outer join SCANNERCFG_DBF SCANNER on (SCANNER.M_REFERENCE=BATCH_NAME.M_SCNTMPL)
left outer join (select M_TYPE, M_FILTER_REF, M_MDCS_SETT from DAPFLT_DAT_DBF COMP_DATE where COMP_DATE.M_INDEX=0) COMP_DATE0 on (COMP_DATE0.M_FILTER_REF=FILTER.M_FILTER_REF)
left outer join (select M_TYPE, M_FILTER_REF, M_MDCS_SETT from DAPFLT_DAT_DBF COMP_DATE where COMP_DATE.M_INDEX=1) COMP_DATE1 on (COMP_DATE1.M_FILTER_REF=FILTER.M_FILTER_REF)
left outer join (select M_TYPE, M_FILTER_REF, M_MDCS_SETT from DAPFLT_DAT_DBF COMP_DATE where COMP_DATE.M_INDEX=2) COMP_DATE2 on (COMP_DATE2.M_FILTER_REF=FILTER.M_FILTER_REF)
left outer join PROCESS#PS_ITEM_DBF ITEM on (ITEM.M_PARAM_LAB2=BATCH_NAME.M_LABEL and ITEM.M_UNIT in ('REP_BATCHES_FEED','REP_BATCHES_EXT','REP_BATCHES_PROC'))
-- to retrieve the number of tables configured in the feeder
left outer join (select count(*) as NUM_DM_TABLE, M_REF from ACT_DYN_DBF group by M_REF) NUM_TABLES on NUM_TABLES.M_REF=BAT.M_REF
left outer join PROCESS#PS_SCRPT_DBF PS on (PS.M_REF=ITEM.M_REF)
left outer join RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_DBF DM on (ACT_DYN.M_OUTPUT=DM.M_LABEL)
left outer join RPO_DMSETUP_DYN_TABLE_DBF DYN on (DM.M_REFERENCE=DYN.M_REFERENCE)
left outer join RPO_CATEG_DBF CATEG on (BAT.M_CATEG=CATEG.M_REF)
-- This table counts the number of batch of feeders having the same label of data with historisation mode = One data set only in case the current batch is in mode one data set per day  
left outer join (select count(*) as NUMBER_BATCH, M_TAGDATA from ACT_SET_DBF where M_DATAHIS=0 and M_TYPE=1 group by M_TAGDATA) HISMODE0 on (HISMODE0.M_TAGDATA=BATCH_NAME.M_TAGDATA and BATCH_NAME.M_DATAHIS=1)
-- This table counts the number of batch of feeders having the same label of data with historisation mode = One data set per day in case the current batch is in mode one data set
left outer join (select count(*) as NUMBER_BATCH, M_TAGDATA from ACT_SET_DBF where M_DATAHIS=1 and M_TYPE=1 group by M_TAGDATA) HISMODE1 on (HISMODE1.M_TAGDATA=BATCH_NAME.M_TAGDATA and BATCH_NAME.M_DATAHIS=0)
-- To retrieve the different historization mode used by batch of feeders for a label of data
left outer join (select count(distinct M_DATAHIS) as NUMBER_DIF_HIS_MODE, M_TAGDATA  from ACT_SET_DBF where M_TYPE=1 group by M_TAGDATA) NUMBER_HIS_MODE on (NUMBER_HIS_MODE.M_TAGDATA=BATCH_NAME.M_TAGDATA)
where 
BAT.M_EXECTX in (5,7,8)   
order by M_PS_LABEL, M_BATCH_LBL

M_CIF,M_TREASURYRM,M_ACCOFFICER,M_REGION

BAB_DEALER_LIMIT.REP|/* THIS TABLE IS CREATED FOR SAS SYSTEM  -  CR 721781 - Murex Integration with SAS
	MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile  ( lookup table) USER SENIORITY BASED ON GROUP'S 
	BAB.ALL.PreDealLimits ( lookup table) -- USER BASED LIMITS ARE CONFIGURED
*/ 


SELECT 

 M_USER_GROUP,
 M_GRP_SERITY,
 M_CURRENCY,
 CAST(M_DLR_LMTAMT AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS M_DLR_LMTAMT,
 CAST(@REPORTING_DATE:D AS DATE) AS M_REP_DATE  -- AS OF YESTERDAY - REPORTING DATE 
 
 FROM 
 
 ( 
 
		SELECT 
			
			TRIM(UDTB179.M_USER_GROUP) AS M_USER_GROUP,
			TRIM(UDTB179.M_SENIORITY) AS M_GRP_SERITY,  -- GROUP_SENIORITY
			TRIM(UDTB264.M_CURR_CHECK) AS M_CURRENCY,
			SUM(UDTB264.M_AMOUNT) AS M_DLR_LMTAMT  -- DEALER LIMIT AMOUNT
			
			
			FROM 
				UDTB179_DBF UDTB179 -- MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile  ( lookup table)
				LEFT OUTER JOIN UDTB264_DBF UDTB264  -- BAB.ALL.PreDealLimits ( lookup table)
				ON TRIM(UDTB179.M_SENIORITY)=TRIM(UDTB264.M_SENIORITY)
			WHERE 
				TRIM((UDTB179.M_USER_GROUP)) IS NOT NULL			
			GROUP BY
			TRIM(UDTB179.M_USER_GROUP),
			TRIM(UDTB179.M_SENIORITY),
			TRIM(UDTB264.M_CURR_CHECK)
			
 )
BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE.REP|select M_LINE_NO, M_CATEGORY, M_NOSTRO_ACCOUNT_NO as M_NOS_ACC, M_SOURCE, M_SIGN_FLAG from UDTB277_DBF

BAB_GROUP_PORTFL.REP|
/* 
	 BAB_GROUP_PORTFL_REP TABLE IS CREATED FOR SAS SYSTEM  -  CR 721781 - Murex Integration with SAS
	 MUREX GROUP ( FOP,MO..ect ) INFORMATION WITH PORTFOLIO templates assigned details
	 
*/ 


SELECT 

 M_GROUP_NAME,
 M_GROUP_DEF,
 M_PRTF_TEMPL,
 M_PORTFOLIO,
 M_PORTF_DESC,
 CAST(@REPORTING_DATE:D AS DATE) AS M_REP_DATE  -- AS OF YESTERDAY - REPORTING DATE 
 
 FROM 
 
 ( 
 
	SELECT DISTINCT 

		TRIM(MX_GROUP.M_LABEL) M_GROUP_NAME,

		TRIM(TRN_GRPD.M_LABEL) AS M_GROUP_DEF,
		
		TRIM(MUB_TPL.M_LABEL) AS M_PRTF_TEMPL,
		
		TRIM(MUB_TREE.M_LABEL) AS M_PORTFOLIO,
		
		TRIM(TRN_PFLD.M_DESC) AS M_PORTF_DESC


	FROM
	
	MX_GROUP_DBF MX_GROUP  -- GROUP BASED TABLE 
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  TRN_GRPD_DBF TRN_GRPD  -- GROUP DESCRIPTION
		ON MX_GROUP.M_REFERENCE=TRN_GRPD.M_EXT_REF
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN MUB#MUB_TPL_DBF  MUB_TPL
		ON TRN_GRPD.M_MUB_TMPL= MUB_TPL.M_REFERENCE

	LEFT OUTER JOIN MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF   MUB_TREE
		ON TRIM(MUB_TPL.M_TRE_GROUP)=TRIM(MUB_TREE.M_TRE_GROUP)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN MUB#GRP_RGT1_DBF  GRP_RGT1
		ON MUB_TREE.M_REF= GRP_RGT1.M_NODE_REF

	JOIN TRN_PFLD_DBF  TRN_PFLD
		ON TRIM(MUB_TREE.M_LABEL)= TRIM(TRN_PFLD.M_DSP_LABEL)
	
	WHERE 
	(TRIM(TRN_GRPD.M_LABEL)  IS NOT NULL) 
	--AND  (TRIM(TYPOLOGY.M_LABEL)<>' ')
	--AND TRIM(MX_GROUP.M_LABEL)='BN_DR'

 ) 
 ORDER BY 
 M_GROUP_NAME,
 M_GROUP_DEF,
 M_PRTF_TEMPL,
 M_PORTFOLIO

BAB_GROUP_TYPOGY.REP|
/* 
	 BAB_GROUP_TYPOGY_REP TABLE IS CREATED FOR SAS SYSTEM  -  CR 721781 - Murex Integration with SAS
	 MUREX GROUP ( FOP,MO..ect ) INFORMATION WITH typology templates assigned 
	 
*/ 


SELECT 

 M_GROUP_NAME,
 M_GROUP_DEF,
 M_GRUP_TEMPL,
 M_TYPOLOGY,
 M_TYPLGY_DES,
 CAST(@REPORTING_DATE:D AS DATE) AS M_REP_DATE  -- AS OF YESTERDAY - REPORTING DATE 
 
 FROM 
 
 ( 
 
	SELECT DISTINCT 

		TRIM(MX_GROUP.M_LABEL) M_GROUP_NAME,

		TRIM(TRN_GRPD.M_LABEL) AS M_GROUP_DEF,

		TRIM(STP_RGH_TREE.M_LABEL) AS M_GRUP_TEMPL,
		--STP_RGH_TREE.M_REFERENCE,
		--STP_RGH_NODE.M_TREE,STP_RGH_NODE.M_TYPO_REF,
		--TYPOLOGY.M_REFERENCE,
		TRIM(TYPOLOGY.M_LABEL) AS M_TYPOLOGY,
		TRIM(TYPOLOGY.M_DESC) AS M_TYPLGY_DES


	FROM
	
	MX_GROUP_DBF MX_GROUP
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  TRN_GRPD_DBF TRN_GRPD
		ON MX_GROUP.M_REFERENCE=TRN_GRPD.M_EXT_REF
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN GRP_STP_DBF GRP_STP  -- RTPRIGHTSELEMENTS 
		ON TRN_GRPD.M_REFERENCE=GRP_STP.M_GRP_REF
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN STP_RGH_TPL_GBL_DBF STP_RGH_TPL_GBL  -- 
		ON GRP_STP.M_RIGHT_DATA=STP_RGH_TPL_GBL.M_REFERENCE
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN STP_RGH_GBL2BO_DBF  STP_RGH_GBL2BO  
		ON STP_RGH_TPL_GBL.M_REFERENCE=STP_RGH_GBL2BO.M_CTN
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN STP_RGH_TPL_BO_DBF STP_RGH_TPL_BO --   --  -- BUSINESS OBJECT TEMPLATE TABLE 
		ON STP_RGH_GBL2BO.M_REF=STP_RGH_TPL_BO.M_REFERENCE
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN STP_RGH_TREE_DBF STP_RGH_TREE --   -- GROUP TEMPLATE TABLE 
		ON STP_RGH_TPL_BO.M_TREE=STP_RGH_TREE.M_REFERENCE
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN STP_RGH_NODE_DBF STP_RGH_NODE --  -- GROUP TEMPLATE TABLE 
		ON STP_RGH_TREE.M_REFERENCE=STP_RGH_NODE.M_TREE
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  TYPOLOGY_DBF  TYPOLOGY
		ON STP_RGH_NODE.M_TYPO_REF=TYPOLOGY.M_REFERENCE
	
	WHERE 
	(TRIM(TRN_GRPD.M_LABEL)  IS NOT NULL)  
	AND  (TRIM(TYPOLOGY.M_LABEL)<>' ')
	--AND TRIM(MX_GROUP.M_LABEL)='BN_DR'

 ) 
 ORDER BY 
  M_GROUP_NAME,
  M_GROUP_DEF,
  M_GRUP_TEMPL,
  M_TYPOLOGY

BAB_LMT_RP_SALES.REP|select

from

BAB_USER_GROUP.REP  |
/* 
	 BAB_USER_GROUP_REP TABLE IS CREATED FOR SAS SYSTEM  -  CR 721781 - Murex Integration with SAS
	 MUREX USERS ( TRADERS ) INFORMATION WITH GROUPS ARE ASSIGNED WITH DESIGNATION ( VIA LOOK UP TABLE)
	 
   
*/ 


SELECT 

 M_USER_LABEL,
 M_FULL_NAME,
 M_USER_DESC,
 M_GROUP_NAME,
 M_USER_ROLE,
 CAST(@REPORTING_DATE:D AS DATE) AS M_REP_DATE  -- AS OF YESTERDAY - REPORTING DATE 
 
 FROM 
 
 ( 
 
		SELECT 

		TRIM(MX_USER.M_LABEL) AS M_USER_LABEL,
		TRIM(MX_USER.M_FULL_NAME) AS M_FULL_NAME, 
		TRIM(MX_USER.M_DESC) AS  M_USER_DESC,
		TRIM(MX_GROUP.M_LABEL) AS  M_GROUP_NAME,
		TRIM(UDTB179.M_SENIORITY) AS M_USER_ROLE

		FROM 

			MX_USER_DBF MX_USER
			LEFT OUTER JOIN MX_USER_GROUP_DBF MX_USER_GROUP
				ON MX_USER.M_REFERENCE=MX_USER_GROUP.M_USER_ID
			LEFT OUTER JOIN MX_GROUP_DBF MX_GROUP
				ON MX_USER_GROUP.M_GROUP_ID=MX_GROUP.M_REFERENCE
			LEFT OUTER JOIN UDTB179_DBF UDTB179 -- MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile  ( lookup table)
				ON TRIM(MX_GROUP.M_LABEL)=TRIM(UDTB179.M_USER_GROUP)
 
 )

BIM_VOL.REP         |select SECATM.M_GROUP as M_GROUP, SECATM.M_LABEL   as M_VOLMAPPING, SECATM.M_MATOPTION as M_MATOPTION,
case
  when  SECVOL.M_ATM_VOL <> 0   THEN  SECVOL.M_ATM_VOL ELSE SECATM.M_ATM_VOL 
END as M_ATM_VOL 
from BIM_SEC_VOL_ATM_REP SECATM left join BIM_SEC_VOL_REP SECVOL 
on SECATM.M_GROUP=SECVOL.M_GROUP AND SECATM.M_LABEL=SECVOL.M_LABEL AND SECATM.M_MATOPTION=SECVOL.M_MAT_OPTIO
union 
select CR_ATM.M_VOL_GROUP as M_GROUP, CR_ATM.M_VOLMAPPIN as M_VOLMAPPING, CR_ATM.M_OPT_MATUR as  M_MATOPTION,
case
  when CR_VOL.M_VOLATILIT <> 0   THEN  CR_VOL.M_VOLATILIT ELSE CR_ATM.M_VOLATILIT
END as M_ATM_VOL
from BIM_CR_VOL_ATM_REP CR_ATM left join BIM_CR_VOL_REP CR_VOL 
on CR_ATM.M_VOL_GROUP =CR_VOL.M_VOL_GROUP AND CR_ATM.M_VOLMAPPIN = CR_VOL.M_VOLMAPPIN AND CR_ATM.M_OPT_MATUR =CR_VOL.M_OPT_MATUR
union select M_GROUP as M_GROUP, M_VOLMAPPIN as M_VOLMAPPING, M_MATURITY as  M_MATOPTION, M_MID as M_ATM_VOL  from BIM_IR_INF_VOL_REP
union select M_GROUP as M_GROUP, M_VOLMAPPIN  as M_VOLMAPPING, M_OPT_MATUR as  M_MATOPTION, M_VOLATILIT as M_ATM_VOL from BIM_IR_CF_VOL_REP
union select M_GROUP as M_GROUP, M_VOLMAPPIN  as M_VOLMAPPING, M_OPT_MATUR as  M_MATOPTION, M_VOLATILIT as M_ATM_VOL  from BIM_IR_SW_VOL_REP

CAL_AUDIT.REP       |select
CHEADER.M_REF as M_CAL_REF,
CHEADER.M_CMP_DATE as M_DATE,
CHEADER.M_CMP_TIME as M_TIME,
CHEADER.M_CMP_TIME1 as M_TIME_S,
CHEADER.M_USR_NAME as M_USER,
CHEADER.M_USR_GROUP as M_GROUP,
CHEADER.M_USR_DESK as M_DESK,
CHEADER.M_TYPE as M_TYPE,
CHEADER.M_ACTION as M_ACTION,
CBODY.M_ID as M_SUBACT_REF,
CBODY.M_FLD_LABEL as M_SUB_ACTION,
CBODY.M_OLD_VALUE as M_OLD_VALUE,
CBODY.M_NEW_VALUE as M_NEW_VALUE,
CDEFINITION.M_DESC as M_C_DESC,
CDEFINITION.M_SWIFTCDE as M_C_SWTCDE,
CDEFINITION.M_ISUNION as M_C_ISUNION,
CDEFINITION.M_SUNDAY as M_C_SU,
CDEFINITION.M_MONDAY as M_C_MO,
CDEFINITION.M_TUESDAY as M_C_TU,
CDEFINITION.M_WDNESDAY as M_C_WE,
CDEFINITION.M_THURSDAY as M_C_TH,

from

where CHEADER.M_CMP_DATE >= @Start_date:D and CHEADER.M_CMP_DATE <=  @End_date:D

CAL_FXO_REFRESH.REP |--FXO
--Spot to Delivery Calendar, Direct modification,  Expiry--
SELECT DISTINCT T1.M_NB AS M_TRADE_NUMB, 
T1.M_RSKSECTION AS M_INSTRUMENT, 
T1.M_BRW_NOM1 AS M_NOMINAL, 
T1.M_BRW_NOMU1 AS M_CURR1,
T1.M_BRW_NOM2 AS M_NOMINAL_2, 
T1.M_BRW_NOMU2 AS M_CURR2, 
T1.M_COMMENT_BS AS M_BS,
CASE 
	WHEN T1.M_BINTERNAL='Y' THEN T1.M_BPFOLIO 
	ELSE T1.M_SPFOLIO END 
AS M_PORTFOLIO, 
T9.M_DSP_LABEL AS M_COUNTERPAR,
T1.M_TRN_STATUS AS M_STATUS, 
TO_CHAR(T1.M_TRN_EXP,'DD/MM/YY') AS M_MATURITY, 
T8.M_LABEL AS M_TRA_TYPO,
T3.M_CALENDAR0 AS M_SPO_DE_CAL,
T3.M_CALENDAR1 AS M_DAT_VA_CAL, 
T4.M_REF AS M_MODIFI_CAL, 
'Spot to delivery Cal' AS M_IMPACT_CAL,
'Expiry - Direct modification' AS M_IMPAC_TYPE,
CASE 
	WHEN T5.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T5.M_NEW_VALUE,'mon DD'),'DD/MM'))
	WHEN T5.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T5.M_OLD_VALUE,'mon DD'),'DD/MM'))
	WHEN T5.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T5.M_OLD_VALUE,'mon DD YYYY'),'DD/MM'))
	ELSE RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T5.M_NEW_VALUE,'mon DD YYYY'),'DD/MM/YY'))
END AS M_MODIF_DATE,
T5.M_FLD_LABEL AS M_MODIF_TYPE 
FROM 
TRN_HDR_DBF T1
JOIN TRN_PLIN_DBF T2 ON T1.M_INSTRUMENT=T2.M_REFERENCE 
JOIN FX_CNT_DBF T3 ON T2.M_LABEL=T3.M_LABEL 
JOIN AUD_CALH_DBF T4 ON T3.M_CALENDAR0=T4.M_REF
JOIN AUD_CALB_DBF T5 ON T4.M_ID=T5.M_ID 
JOIN TYPOLOGY_DBF T8 ON T1.M_TYPOLOGY = T8.M_REFERENCE
JOIN TRN_CPDF_DBF T9 ON (T9.M_LABEL = T1.M_SPFOLIO OR T9.M_LABEL = T1.M_BPFOLIO)
WHERE 
T1.M_TRN_STATUS <> 'DEAD' 
AND T1.M_TRN_FMLY = 'CURR' 
AND T1.M_TRN_GRP = 'OPT'  
AND T4.M_ACTION='MODIFICATION' 
AND (((T5.M_FLD_LABEL ='INSERT_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY') AND TO_CHAR(T1.M_TRN_EXP, 'mon DD YYYY') = RTRIM(T5.M_NEW_VALUE)) OR ((T5.M_FLD_LABEL ='INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY') AND TO_CHAR(T1.M_TRN_EXP, 'mon DD') = RTRIM(T5.M_NEW_VALUE)) OR ((T5.M_FLD_LABEL ='DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY') AND TO_CHAR(T1.M_TRN_EXP, 'mon DD YYYY') = RTRIM(T5.M_OLD_VALUE)) OR ((T5.M_FLD_LABEL ='DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY') AND TO_CHAR(T1.M_TRN_EXP, 'mon DD') = RTRIM(T5.M_OLD_VALUE)))
AND T4.M_SYS_DATE = @currentdate:D
UNION

JOIN RT_LNGN_DBF T4 ON T3.M_GEN_NUM = T4.M_GEN_NUM
JOIN CAL_UNI_DBF T9 ON (T4.M_FIX_CLN0=T9.M_CTN OR T4.M_FIX_CLN1=T9.M_CTN OR T4.M_PAY_CLN0=T9.M_CTN OR T4.M_PAY_CLN1=T9.M_CTN OR T4.M_CAP_CLN0=T9.M_CTN OR T4.M_CAP_CLN1=T9.M_CTN) 
JOIN AUD_CALH_DBF T5 ON T5.M_REF=T9.M_REF
JOIN AUD_CALB_DBF T6 ON T5.M_ID=T6.M_ID 
JOIN TYPOLOGY_DBF T7 ON T2.M_TYPOLOGY = T7.M_REFERENCE
JOIN TRN_CPDF_DBF T8 ON (T8.M_LABEL = T2.M_SPFOLIO OR T8.M_LABEL = T2.M_BPFOLIO)
WHERE  
T5.M_SYS_DATE = @currentdate:D
AND T5.M_ACTION = 'MODIFICATION' 
AND T2.M_TRN_STATUS <> 'DEAD' AND T2.M_TRN_FMLY = 'IRD'
AND (T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY')

----floatingloan-------
UNION 

SELECT DISTINCT T2.M_NB AS M_TRADE_NUMB, 
RTRIM(T1.M_DSP_LABEL) AS M_INSTRUMENT, 
T2.M_BRW_NOM1 AS M_NOMINAL, 
T2.M_BRW_NOMU1 AS M_CURR, 
CASE 
	WHEN T2.M_BINTERNAL ='Y' THEN T2.M_BPFOLIO 
	ELSE T2.M_SPFOLIO END 
AS M_PORTFOLIO, 
T8.M_DSP_LABEL AS M_COUNTERPAR,
RTRIM(TO_CHAR(T2.M_TRN_EXP,'DD/MM/YY')) AS M_MATURITY, 
RTRIM(TO_CHAR(T2.M_TRN_DATE,'DD/MM/YY')) AS M_TRADE_DATE, 
T7.M_LABEL AS M_TRA_TYPO,
T5.M_REF AS M_MODIFI_CAL,
CASE 
	WHEN T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_NEW_VALUE,'mon DD'),'DD/MM'))
	WHEN T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_OLD_VALUE,'mon DD'),'DD/MM'))
	WHEN T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_OLD_VALUE,'mon DD YYYY'),'DD/MM'))
	ELSE RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_NEW_VALUE,'mon DD YYYY'),'DD/MM/YY'))
END AS M_MODIF_DATE,
'Direct modification' AS M_MOD_TYPE,
T5.M_REF AS M_FIX_CAL, 
'' AS M_FIX_CAL2, 
'' AS M_PAY_CAL, 
'' AS M_PAY_CAL2, 
'' AS M_CAP_CAL, 
'' AS M_CAP_CAL2
FROM 
TRN_HDR_DBF T2
JOIN TRN_PLIN_DBF T1 ON T2.M_INSTRUMENT=T1.M_ID 
JOIN RT_LOAN_DBF T3 ON (T2.M_NB=T3.M_NB AND T3.M_GEN_NUM=-2)
JOIN RT_INDEX_DBF T4 ON T3.M_GEN_IND = T4.M_INDEX
JOIN FX_CURR_DBF T10 ON T4.M_CURRENCY = T10.M_LABEL
JOIN AUD_CALH_DBF T5 ON T5.M_REF=T10.M_HOLCLN0
JOIN AUD_CALB_DBF T6 ON T5.M_ID=T6.M_ID 
JOIN TYPOLOGY_DBF T7 ON T2.M_TYPOLOGY = T7.M_REFERENCE
JOIN TRN_CPDF_DBF T8 ON (T8.M_LABEL = T2.M_SPFOLIO OR T8.M_LABEL = T2.M_BPFOLIO)
WHERE  
T5.M_SYS_DATE = @currentdate:D
AND T5.M_ACTION = 'MODIFICATION' 
AND T2.M_TRN_STATUS <> 'DEAD' AND T2.M_TRN_FMLY = 'IRD'
AND (T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY')

----fixed loan-------
UNION 

SELECT DISTINCT T2.M_NB AS M_TRADE_NUMB, 
RTRIM(T1.M_DSP_LABEL) AS M_INSTRUMENT, 
T2.M_BRW_NOM1 AS M_NOMINAL, 
T2.M_BRW_NOMU1 AS M_CURR, 
CASE 
	WHEN T2.M_BINTERNAL ='Y' THEN T2.M_BPFOLIO 
	ELSE T2.M_SPFOLIO END 
AS M_PORTFOLIO, 
T8.M_DSP_LABEL AS M_COUNTERPAR,
RTRIM(TO_CHAR(T2.M_TRN_EXP,'DD/MM/YY')) AS M_MATURITY, 
RTRIM(TO_CHAR(T2.M_TRN_DATE,'DD/MM/YY')) AS M_TRADE_DATE, 
T7.M_LABEL AS M_TRA_TYPO,
T5.M_REF AS M_MODIFI_CAL,
CASE 
	WHEN T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_NEW_VALUE,'mon DD'),'DD/MM'))
	WHEN T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_OLD_VALUE,'mon DD'),'DD/MM'))
	WHEN T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_OLD_VALUE,'mon DD YYYY'),'DD/MM'))
	ELSE RTRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T6.M_NEW_VALUE,'mon DD YYYY'),'DD/MM/YY'))
END AS M_MODIF_DATE,
'Direct modification' AS M_MOD_TYPE,
'' AS M_FIX_CAL, 
'' AS M_FIX_CAL2, 
T5.M_REF AS M_PAY_CAL, 
'' AS M_PAY_CAL2, 
T5.M_REF AS M_CAP_CAL, 
'' AS M_CAP_CAL2
FROM 
TRN_HDR_DBF T2
JOIN TRN_PLIN_DBF T1 ON T2.M_INSTRUMENT=T1.M_ID 
JOIN RT_LOAN_DBF T3 ON (T2.M_NB=T3.M_NB AND T3.M_GEN_NUM=-2)
JOIN FX_CURR_DBF T4 ON T3.M_GEN_CUR = T4.M_LABEL
JOIN AUD_CALH_DBF T5 ON T5.M_REF=T4.M_HOLCLN0
JOIN AUD_CALB_DBF T6 ON T5.M_ID=T6.M_ID 
JOIN TYPOLOGY_DBF T7 ON T2.M_TYPOLOGY = T7.M_REFERENCE
JOIN TRN_CPDF_DBF T8 ON (T8.M_LABEL = T2.M_SPFOLIO OR T8.M_LABEL = T2.M_BPFOLIO)
WHERE  
T5.M_SYS_DATE = @currentdate:D
AND T5.M_ACTION = 'MODIFICATION' 
AND T2.M_TRN_STATUS <> 'DEAD' AND T2.M_TRN_FMLY = 'IRD'
AND (T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY' OR T6.M_FLD_LABEL = 'DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY')

CONS_FAIL.REP       |select distinct
  T.M_TRADE_NUM as M_TRADE_NUM
from
  (
    select 
      T1.M_TRADE_NUM as M_TRADE_NUM
    from 
      POS_REP_DET_REP T1
    left join POS_REP_CONS_REP T2 on (T1.M_STRADE_NUM=T2.M_STRADE_NUM and T1.M_PORTFOLIO=T2.M_PORTFOLIO and T1.M_CURRENCY=T2.M_CURRENCY)
      where T2.M_TRADE_NUM is NULL
      and
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_CASH)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_P_L__ABS_)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FEE)      >0.01
        )
        AND
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or T1.M_CASH          =0
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or T1.M_P_L__ABS_     =0
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or T1.M_FEE           =0
        )
    union

    select 
          T1.M_TRADE_NUM as M_TRADE_NUM
        from 
           POS_REP_CONS_REP T1
        left join POS_REP_DET_REP T2 on (T1.M_STRADE_NUM=T2.M_STRADE_NUM and T1.M_PORTFOLIO=T2.M_PORTFOLIO and T1.M_CURRENCY=T2.M_CURRENCY)
          where T2.M_TRADE_NUM is NULL
        and
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_CASH)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_P_L__ABS_)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FEE)      >0.01
        )
        AND T1.M_TRADE_NUM<>0
        AND
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or T1.M_CASH          =0
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or T1.M_P_L__ABS_     =0
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or T1.M_FEE           =0
        )
     
    union
    select distinct
      T1.M_TRADE_NUM
    from
      POS_REP_CONS_REP T1
    , POS_REP_DET_REP  T2
    where
      (
        (
          T1.M_TRADE_NUM     IS NULL
          and T2.M_TRADE_NUM IS NULL
        )
        or
        (
          (
            T1.M_TRADE_NUM
          )
          =(T2.M_TRADE_NUM)
        )
      )
      and
      (
        (
          T1.M_PORTFOLIO     IS NULL
          and T2.M_PORTFOLIO IS NULL
        )
        or
        (
          (
            T1.M_PORTFOLIO
          )
          =(T2.M_PORTFOLIO)
        )
      )
      and
      (
        (
          T1.M_CURRENCY     IS NULL
          and T2.M_CURRENCY IS NULL
        )
        or
        (
          (
            T1.M_CURRENCY
          )
          =(T2.M_CURRENCY)
        )
      )
      AND
      (
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CASH - T2.M_CASH) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL- T2.M_CAPITAL) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_FINANCING- T2.M_FINANCING) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_MV- T2.M_MV) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT- T2.M_PV_EFFECT) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_P_L__ABS_- T2.M_P_L__ABS_) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_REVENUES- T2.M_REVENUES) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_FEE- T2.M_FEE) >=1
        )
      )
  )
  T

PERF_BM_ASG_ALL.REP |select Origin_table.* from ( select 
        ptf.M_LEVEL,
       case 
       when bm.M_INV_LABEL <>'' then  bm.M_INV_LABEL 
       else ptf.M_LABEL end as M_INV_LABEL,
        ptf.M_LABEL as M_INV_PTF,
        bm.M_REF_CLASS,
        case
        when bm.M_REF_LABEL <>'' then bm.M_REF_LABEL
        else 'No Benchmark' end as M_REF_LABEL,
        bm.M_INV_TYPE,
        case
        when bm.M_ASSIGN_LBL <>'' then bm.M_ASSIGN_LBL
        else 'No Assignment' end as M_ASSIGN_LBL,
        bm.M_REF_TYPE ,
        bm.M_END_DATE ,
        bm.M_MODEL_PTF ,
        bm.M_START_DATE ,
        bm.M_USAGE_LBL
       -- bm.M_DEFAULT
      from PERF_PTF_SIM_LVL_REP ptf 
      left join PERF_BM_ASG_LVL_REP bm 
      on ptf.M_LABEL = bm.M_INV_PTF AND ptf.M_LEVEL = bm.M_LEVEL
) Origin_table
where Origin_table.M_INV_PTF in (select M_INV_PTF from PERF_BM_ASG_LVL_REP)
union
select Origin_table2.* from ( select 
        '#Technical' as M_LEVEL,
       case 
       when bm.M_INV_LABEL <>'' then  bm.M_INV_LABEL 
       else ptf.M_LABEL end as M_INV_LABEL,
        ptf.M_LABEL as M_INV_PTF,
        bm.M_REF_CLASS,
        case
        when bm.M_REF_LABEL <>'' then bm.M_REF_LABEL
        else 'No Benchmark' end as M_REF_LABEL,
        bm.M_INV_TYPE,
        case
        when bm.M_ASSIGN_LBL <>'' then bm.M_ASSIGN_LBL
        else 'No Assignment' end as M_ASSIGN_LBL,
        bm.M_REF_TYPE ,
        bm.M_END_DATE ,
        bm.M_MODEL_PTF ,
        bm.M_START_DATE ,
        bm.M_USAGE_LBL
       -- bm.M_DEFAULT
      from PERF_PTF_SIM_LVL_REP ptf 
      left join PERF_BM_ASG_LVL_REP bm 
      on ptf.M_LABEL = bm.M_INV_PTF AND ptf.M_LEVEL = bm.M_LEVEL
      where ptf.M_LEVEL = 'Level0'
) Origin_table2
where Origin_table2.M_INV_PTF not in (select M_INV_PTF from PERF_BM_ASG_LVL_REP)

PERF_BM_ASG_LVL.REP |      select 
        ptf.M_LEVEL,
        ptf.M_LABEL as M_INV_LABEL,
        bm.M_INV_PTF,
        bm.M_REF_CLASS,
        bm.M_REF_LABEL,
        bm.M_INV_TYPE,
        bm.M_ASSIGN_LBL,
        bm.M_REF_TYPE ,
        bm.M_END_DATE ,
        bm.M_MODEL_PTF ,
        bm.M_START_DATE ,
        bm.M_USAGE_LBL
      --  bm.M_DEFAULT
      from PERF_PTF_ASG_LVL_REP ptf 
      right join MX_PERF_ASSIGN_REP bm 
      on ptf.M_LABEL = bm.M_INV_LABEL

PERF_PTF_ASG_LVL.REP|SELECT M_LABEL, 'Level'+ CONVERT(varchar, ABS(M_HEIGHT-(select max(M_HEIGHT) from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF))) as M_LEVEL 
FROM MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF

PERF_PTF_SIM_LVL.REP|select  M_LABEL, 'Level0' as M_LEVELLLL from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF where M_HEIGHT = (select max(M_HEIGHT) from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF)
UNION 
SELECT  M_LABEL, 'Level1' as M_LEVEL from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF where M_HEIGHT =(select max(M_HEIGHT) from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF)
UNION 
SELECT  M_LABEL, 'Level2' as M_LEVEL from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF where M_HEIGHT =(select max(M_HEIGHT) from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF)

M_INDEXNAME as M_INDEXNAME

PL_ASS.REP          |select	
PLIN.M_DSP_LABEL as M_INSTRLABEL,
ASS.M_DATE,

ASS.M_CSFU_REV,

ASS.M_CSNFR_REV,

PS_AUDIT.REP        |select 
M_DATE_CMP as M_START_DATE,
-- correct End date in case a job started at day n-1 and ended at date n
case
	when M_TIME_CMP-(cast(to_char(to_date(M_TIME_ELAP,'hh24:mi:ss'),'sssss') as Numeric(30))) < 0 then M_DATE_CMP+ interval '1' day
	else M_DATE_CMP 
end as M_END_DATE,
--convert elapsed,CPU,syabse time from string to number of seconds
cast(to_char(to_date(M_TIME_ELAP,'hh24:mi:ss'),'sssss') as Numeric(30)) as M_ELAP_SEC,
cast(to_char(to_date(M_TIME_CPU,'hh24:mi:ss'),'sssss') as Numeric(30)) as M_CPU_SEC,
cast(to_char(to_date(M_TIME_SYB,'hh24:mi:ss'),'sssss')as Numeric(30)) as M_SYB_SEC,
--Get start time in seconds and manage when End time is < start time (i.e script ended next day)
case
when (M_TIME_CMP-(cast(to_char(to_date(M_TIME_ELAP,'hh24:mi:ss'),'sssss') as Numeric(30)))) < 0 then 86400+(M_TIME_CMP-(cast(to_char(to_date(M_TIME_ELAP,'hh24:mi:ss'),'sssss') as Numeric(30))))
  else (M_TIME_CMP-(cast(to_char(to_date(M_TIME_ELAP,'hh24:mi:ss'),'sssss') as Numeric(30))))
END as M_START_TIME,
M_TIME_CMP as M_END_TIME,
SCRIPT as M_SCRIPT,
M_ERR_COUNT as M_ERR_COUNT,
M_DESC as M_DESC,
cast(CNT_DM_UNITS as Numeric(38))as M_DM_UTS,
cast(TRADES.NB_TRADES as Numeric(38))as  M_NB_TRADES,
M_USER as M_USER,
M_GROUP as M_GROUP,
M_UNIT_NAME as M_UNIT_NAME,
M_AUDT_TYPE as M_AUDT_TYPE,
UNIT as M_UNIT,
M_NPID as M_NPID

from
(
select
               M_DATE_SYS, 
               M_DATE_CMP,
               M_TIME_CMP,
               M_COMMENT,
               SUBSTR (M_COMMENT, INSTR(M_COMMENT,'[',1,1) +1 , (INSTR(M_COMMENT,']',1,1)-INSTR(M_COMMENT,'[',1,1)-1)) as SCRIPT,
               ltrim(SUBSTR(M_COMMENT,-(length(M_COMMENT)-INSTR(M_COMMENT,': step',1,1)))) as UNIT,
							 M_TIME_ELAP, 
               M_TIME_CPU,
               M_ERR_COUNT, 
               M_TIME_SYB,
               M_USER,
               M_GROUP,
               M_UNIT_NAME,
					M_NPID,
               case
                  when M_COMMENT like '%] : step%' then 'By step'
                  else 'By script'
               end as M_AUDT_TYPE
               from TRN_EODA_DBF
               where 
               M_COMMENT like '%Script%' 
               and M_COMMENT not like '%] : Check%' 
   						 and M_COMMENT not like '%: Summary%' 
						   and M_COMMENT not like '%WRN:%' 
						   and M_COMMENT not like 'WRN:%' 
						   and M_COMMENT not like 'ER%' 
               and M_START_END = 'END'
               and M_DATE_CMP >=  @Start_date:D and M_DATE_CMP <= @End_date:D
) AUDITA
left join
(
               SELECT
               SCRIPT.M_NAME,
               SCRIPT.M_DESC,
               DM_UNITS.CNT_DM_UNITS
               FROM 
               PROCESS#PS_SCRPT_DBF SCRIPT 
                              LEFT JOIN 
                              (SELECT 
                              M_REF,
                              COUNT(*) as CNT_DM_UNITS from PROCESS#PS_ITEM_DBF ITEM where M_UNIT in ('REPORTING','REP_BATCHES_EXT','REP_BATCHES_FEED','REP_BATCHES_PROC','REP_BATCHES_REP','BATCH-PRINT','MREPORTS_EXECUTE','REP_AUDIT_MAINTENANC','REP_VERIFY','REP_AUDIT_CLEAN','REP_PURGE_RULE','REP_JOB_PURGE','STOREDPROC_ADAPT','REP_ADAPT','EOD-DM-REFRESH','EOD-MD-REFRESH','EOD-SD-REFRESH','REP_AUTO_ARCHIVE','REP_DEL_DIR','DEALSCANNER_ITEMS','DEALSCANNER_TABLES')  
                              GROUP BY M_REF) DM_UNITS
                              ON SCRIPT.M_REF=DM_UNITS.M_REF
) SCRIPTS
on AUDITA.SCRIPT = SCRIPTS.M_NAME
left join
(
               select 
               M_TRN_DATE,
               COUNT(*) as NB_TRADES
               from TRN_HDR_DBF 
               where 
               M_TRN_DATE >= @Start_date:D and M_TRN_DATE <=@End_date:D
               group by M_TRN_DATE
) TRADES
on AUDITA.M_DATE_CMP = TRADES.M_TRN_DATE

RANGE_INDEX.REP     |SELECT M_RNG_NB AS M_RNG_NB
    , M_RNG_INDEX AS M_RNG_INDEX
    , M_RNG_RATE0 AS M_RNG_RATE0
    , M_RNG_RATE1 AS M_RNG_RATE1
    , M_PUBLICATION AS M_PUBLICATIO
FROM RT_RANGE_DBF
RATE_CURVES.REP     |select M_REFERENCE as M_RT_KEY, M_DLABEL as M_LABEL from RT_CT_DBF where M_EVALUATION=0 and M_REFERENCE<>0

REC_NC_ACC.REP      |SELECT 
ACT_CASH_DBF.M_REFERENCE as M_REFERENCE,
ACT_CASH_DBF.M_LABEL as M_MX_ACCT_NB
FROM ACT_CASH_DBF
INNER JOIN ACT_CASHE_DBF ON ACT_CASHE_DBF.M_REFERENCE = ACT_CASH_DBF.M_REFERENCE
WHERE ACT_CASHE_DBF.M_TYPE = 'Cash' AND ACT_CASHE_DBF.M_IS_REC = 1

REC_NC_UDF.REP      |select
dlv.M_REFERENCE as M_DLV_REF,
dlv.M_PARENT_REF as M_PARENT_REF,
udf.M_CR_FLW_REF as M_CR_FLW_REF,
udf.M_CR_PRD_FLW as M_CR_PRD_FLW
from DLV_CASH_DBF dlv
inner join TRN_EXT_DBF ext on ext.M_ORIG_TRADE = dlv.M_TRD_REF
inner join TRN_HDR_DBF hdr on hdr.M_LEXTREF = ext.M_REFERENCE
left join TABLE#DATA#DEALSCF_DBF udf on udf.M_NB = ext.M_UDF_REF 
where ((hdr.M_TRN_FMLY = 'SCF'  and dlv.M_STP_STATUS = 'Settled') or dlv.M_PARENT_REF <> 0)
and hdr.M_TRN_STATUS = 'LIVE'
and dlv.M_PROD_CVER = 0

SD_BSK_COMP.REP     |select
        -- fields common to indices with underlyings, but with different treatment per type
		-- Basket index reference
        IND.M_REFERENCE as M_BSK_INDREF,
        case
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then COMP.M_ORDER 
            else 0
        -- for baskets, component order
		end as M_COMP_COUNT, 
		-- Component weight
        COMP.M_WEIGHT as M_COMPWEIGHT,
		-- Component spread
        COMP.M_SPREAD as M_COMPSPREAD,
		-- Component power
        COMP.M_POWER as M_COMPPOWER, 
        case 
            when COMP.M_CUSTOMIZED_CONVERSION=1 then 'CustomConversion' 
            else ' ' 
		-- Component customized conversion	
        end	as M_COMP_CCONV,
		-- Component conversion
        COMP.M_CONVERSION as M_COMP_CONV,
        case
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then BC.M_IND_LAB -- for baskets, provide underlying label
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CMFUT.M_LABEL -- for commodity future indices and nearbies, provide the future label
            else AU_IND.M_IND_LAB -- for compound/average/start-end, provide the underlying
        end as M_COMPONENT,
		-- Component Description
        case
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then BC.M_IND_DESC
            else AU_IND.M_IND_DESC
        end as M_COMP_DESC,
        -- Component category
        case
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then
                case
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=0 then 'Rate'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=1 then 'Equity'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=2 then 'Bond'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=3 then 'Inflation'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=4 then 'FX spot'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=5 then 'Pool factor'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=6 then 'Generic index'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=7 then 'Formula'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=8 then 'Commodity'
                    when BC.M_CATEGORY=9 then 'ComFutureMaturity'
                    else cast(AU_IND.M_CATEGORY as char(10)) -- there should not be others
                end
            else 
                case
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=0 then 'Rate'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=1 then 'Equity'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=2 then 'Bond'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=3 then 'Inflation'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=4 then 'FX spot'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=5 then 'Pool factor'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=6 then 'Generic index'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=7 then 'Formula'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=8 then 'Commodity'
                    when AU_IND.M_CATEGORY=9 then 'ComFutureMaturity'
                else cast(AU_IND.M_CATEGORY as char(10)) -- there should not be others
                end
        end as M_COMP_CATEG,
		-- Component type
        case
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then
                case
                    when BC.M_RESET=0 then 'Published'
                    when BC.M_RESET=2 then 'Compounded'
                    when BC.M_RESET=3 then 'Average'
                    when BC.M_RESET=4 then 'Basket'
                    when BC.M_RESET=5 then 'Start-end'
                    when BC.M_RESET=6 then 'Nearby'
                    else cast(BC.M_RESET as char(10)) -- there should not be others
                end
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then -- for Commodity future indices and nearbies, list the type of instrument underlying
                case
                    when CMFUT.M_LISTED=1 then 'Future'
                    when CMFUT.M_LISTED=2 then 'Forward'
                    when CMFUT.M_LISTED=16 then 'Cleared swap'
                    when CMFUT.M_LISTED=32 then 'Cleared asian'
                    when CMFUT.M_LISTED=64 then 'Listed option on Future'
                    else '?Missing'
                end
            else
                case
                    when AU_IND.M_RESET=0 then 'Published'
                    when AU_IND.M_RESET=2 then 'Compounded'
                    when AU_IND.M_RESET=3 then 'Average'
                    when AU_IND.M_RESET=4 then 'Basket'
                    when AU_IND.M_RESET=5 then 'Start-end'
                    when AU_IND.M_RESET=6 then 'Nearby'
                    else cast(AU_IND.M_RESET as char(10)) -- there should not be others
                end
        end as M_COMP_TYPE,
		-- Component currency
        case 
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_QUOT.M_CURR -- future index and nearby, read from the index quotation
            when IND.M_RESET=0 then null -- there is no component here
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then BC.M_COM_CUR
            when IND.M_RESET>0 then AU_QUOT.M_CURR -- take from underlying
            else '?Unknown'
        end as M_COMP_CUR,
        -- Component quotation		
        case 
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then BC_QUOT.M_LABEL
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_QUOT.M_LABEL
            else AU_QUOT.M_LABEL 
        end as M_COMP_QUOT,
		-- Component quotation currency
        case 
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then BC_QUOT.M_CURR
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_QUOT.M_CURR
            else AU_QUOT.M_CURR
        end as M_COMP_Q_CUR,
		-- Component quotation price factor
        case 
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then cast(BC_QUOT.M_PRC_FACT as numeric(16,8))
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then cast(CFI_QUOT.M_PRC_FACT as numeric(16,8))
            else cast(AU_QUOT.M_PRC_FACT as numeric(16,8))
        end as M_COMP_P_FAC, -- note: UQ fields not handled if underlying is a basket
		-- Component quotation unit
        case 
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then BC_QUNIT.M_LABEL
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_QUNIT.M_LABEL
            else AU_QUNIT.M_LABEL  
        end as M_COMP_QUNIT,
        case 
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then BC_DUNIT.M_LABEL
            when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_DUNIT.M_LABEL
            else AU_DUNIT.M_LABEL 
        end as M_COMP_DEL_U
		-- Component Serie        
    from
        RT_INDEX_DBF IND -- main index table (average level)
        -- "Basket" joins
        join RT_INDBK_COMPONENT_DBF COMP on IND.M_REFERENCE = COMP.M_BASKET_REFERENCE -- reference of basket components to the main basket -- this is deliberately NO "left" join
        left join RT_INDEX_DBF BC on COMP.M_INDEX = BC.M_INDEX -- link to the underlying component
        left join CMC_QUOT_DBF BC_QUOT on BC.M_COM_QUOT = BC_QUOT.M_REFERENCE -- reference of the component quotation
        left join CM_UNIT_DBF BC_DUNIT on BC_QUOT.M_QTY_UNIT = BC_DUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for component delivery unit
        left join CM_UNIT_DBF BC_QUNIT on BC_QUOT.M_UNIT = BC_QUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for component quotation unit
       -- "Average" joins
        left join RT_INDEX_DBF AU_IND on IND.M_UNDRL = AU_IND.M_INDEX -- index table (underlying level)
        left join CMC_QUOT_DBF AU_QUOT on AU_IND.M_COM_QUOT = AU_QUOT.M_REFERENCE -- reference to quotation table
        left join CM_UNIT_DBF AU_DUNIT on AU_QUOT.M_QTY_UNIT = AU_DUNIT.M_REFERENCE -- reference to unit table for delivery unit
        left join CM_UNIT_DBF AU_QUNIT on AU_QUOT.M_UNIT = AU_QUNIT.M_REFERENCE -- reference to unit table for quotation unit

        -- "Future index" joins
        left join CM_FUT_DBF CMFUT on IND.M_COM_FUT=CMFUT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to underlying future (works for future index and nearby)
        left join CM_FMAT1_DBF CFI_MAT on IND.M_COM_MAT = CFI_MAT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to underlying future maturity
        left join CMC_QUOT_DBF CFI_QUOT on IND.M_COM_QUOT=CFI_QUOT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to underlying quotation (works for future index, nearby and com spot)
        left join CM_UNIT_DBF CFI_DUNIT on CFI_QUOT.M_QTY_UNIT = CFI_DUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for future index delivery unit
        left join CM_UNIT_DBF CFI_QUNIT on CFI_QUOT.M_UNIT = CFI_QUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for future index quotation unit
        left join CM_MKT_DBF CFI_PUB on CFI_QUOT.M_PUBLI=CFI_PUB.M_REFERENCE

SD_INDEX.REP        |select
        -- Common index fields, using ONLY RT_INDEX
		-- Creation mode
        case 
            when IND.M_CREAT_MODE=0 then 'User-defined' 
            else 'Customized'
        end as M_CREATEMODE, 
		-- Index Category
        case
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=0 then 'Rate'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=1 then 'Equity'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=2 then 'Bond'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=3 then 'Inflation'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=4 then 'FX spot'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=5 then 'Pool factor'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=6 then 'Generic index'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=7 then 'Formula'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=8 then 'Commodity'
            when IND.M_CATEGORY=9 then 'ComFutureMaturity'
            else cast(IND.M_CATEGORY as char(10)) -- there should not be others
        end as M_IND_CATEG, -- column for later merge with other index types
		-- Index type
        case
            when IND.M_RESET=0 then 'Published'
            when IND.M_RESET=2 then 'Compounded'
            when IND.M_RESET=3 then 'Average'
            when IND.M_RESET=4 then 'Basket'
            when IND.M_RESET=5 then 'Start-end'
            when IND.M_RESET=6 then 'Nearby'
            else cast(IND.M_RESET as char(10)) -- there should not be others
        end as M_IND_TYPE,
		-- Index label
        IND.M_IND_LAB as M_IND_LABEL,
        -- Index reference 
        IND.M_REFERENCE as M_IND_REF,
        -- Deletion date		
        IND.M_LOG_DEL as M_DEL_DATE,	-- if not null: date at which index was logically deleted (i.e. removed from visibility from pricing)
        -- Rounding rule
		case 
            when IND.M_CRND_RULE=0 then ' '
            when IND.M_CRND_RULE=1 then 'Nearest'
            -- other rules to be documented
            else cast(IND.M_CRND_RULE as char(10))
        end as M_ROUND_RULE,
		-- Rounding decimals
        case
            when IND.M_CRND_RULE=0 then null
            else IND.M_CRND_DEC
        end as M_ROUND_DEC,
        -- "Average/Compounded/Start-end" fields
        -- Average fixing schedule		
        IND.M_UEI as M_AVG_FIXSCH,
		-- Average shifter first 
        case
            when IND.M_F_SHIFT=1 then IND.M_F_SHIFTER 
            else ' ' 
        end as M_AVG_SHFFST,
		-- Average shifter last
        case
            when IND.M_L_SHIFT=1 then IND.M_L_SHIFTER 
            else ' '
        end as M_AVG_SHFLST,
        IND.M_U_FSHIFT as M_U_FSHIFT,
        IND.M_U_LSHIFT as M_U_LSHIFT,
        -- "Basket" fields
		-- Basket type
        case
            when IND.M_RESET<>4 then ' ' -- filter out not relevant items
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=0 then 'WeightedAverage'
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=1 then 'Sum'
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=2 then 'Multiplication'
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=3 then 'Max'
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=4 then 'Min'
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=5 then 'Ratio'
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=6 then 'Inverse'
            when IND.M_BSK_MODE=7 then 'UserDefined'
            else 'Unknown Basket Type'
        end as M_BSK_TYPE,
		-- Basket treatment
        case 
            when IND.M_AVG_UND=0 then ' '
            when IND.M_AVG_UND=3 then 'Average'
            when IND.M_AVG_UND=5 then 'Start-end'
            else 'Unknown underlying averaging mode'
        end as M_BSK_TREAT,
		-- Basket treatment schedule
        case 
            when IND.M_AVG_UND=0 then ' '
            else IND.M_UEI
        end as M_BSK_SCH,
        -- Commodity nearby index fields
        case 
            when IND.M_COM_NBY_T=0 then null
            when IND.M_COM_NBY_T=2 then 'Index'
            else 'Future'
        end as M_NEARB_TYPE,
		-- Commodity nearby order
        case 
            when IND.M_COM_NBY_T=1 then IND.M_COM_NBY_O
    --        when IND.M_COM_NBY_T=2 then 0
            else 0
        end as M_NEARB_ORD
    -- to get fields needed for future joins to other tables: when building the extraction just join with M_REFERENCE to get all details
    from
        RT_INDEX_DBF IND -- main index table (average level)

SD_INDEX_UND.REP    |select 
    -- Underlying index reference
    IND.M_REFERENCE as M_U_IND_REF,
	-- Index description
	case
		when IND.M_CATEGORY=8 then
			case 
				when IND.M_RESET=0 then CMIND.M_DESC
				else IND.M_IND_DESC
			end
		else IND.M_IND_DESC
	end as M_IND_DESC,
	-- Index currency
    case 
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_QUOT.M_CURR
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=8 and IND.M_RESET=0) then CFI_QUOT.M_CURR
		when IND.M_CURRENCY=' ' then AU_IND.M_CURRENCY
		else IND.M_CURRENCY
	end as M_IND_CUR, -- look for underlying if not found. It is not ideal, it is better to work out a subquery to list underlyings and then join on that basis
	-- Index publication
	case
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_PUB.M_LABEL
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=8 and IND.M_RESET=0) then CFI_PUB.M_LABEL
		else RTG.M_GRP_DESC 
	end as M_IND_PUB,
	-- Index publication calendar
	case
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_PUB.M_CALENDAR
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=8 and IND.M_RESET=0) then CFI_PUB.M_CALENDAR
		else RTG.M_CALENDAR
	end as M_IND_PUBCAL,
	-- Commodity quotation
	CFI_QUOT.M_LABEL as M_COM_QUOT,	-- for Commodity only
	-- Commodity quotation symbol
	CFI_QUOT.M_TRAD_SMB as M_COM_Q_SYMB,
	-- Commodity quotation price factor
	CFI_QUOT.M_PRC_FACT as M_COM_Q_PFAC,
    -- Commodity quotation unit
	case
		when IND.M_RESET=3 then AU_QUNIT.M_LABEL
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_QUNIT.M_LABEL
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=8 and IND.M_RESET=0) then CFI_QUNIT.M_LABEL
		else IND_QUNIT.M_LABEL
	end as M_COM_Q_UNIT,	-- for Commodity only
	-- Commodity delivery unit
    case
		when IND.M_RESET=3 then AU_DUNIT.M_LABEL
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=9 or IND.M_RESET=6) then CFI_DUNIT.M_LABEL
		when (IND.M_CATEGORY=8 and IND.M_RESET=0) then CFI_DUNIT.M_LABEL
		else IND_DUNIT.M_LABEL 
	end as M_COM_DEL_U,	-- for Commodity only
	-- Commodity price width
	CFI_QUOT.M_PRC_WIDTH as M_Q_PWIDTH,	-- for Commodity spot/nearby only
	-- Commodity price decimals
	CFI_QUOT.M_PRC_DEC as M_Q_PDEC,	-- for Commodity spot/nearbyonly
	-- Commodity volatility width
	CFI_QUOT.M_VOL_WIDTH as M_Q_VOLWIDTH,	-- for Commodity spot/nearbyonly
	-- Commodity volatility decimals
	CFI_QUOT.M_VOL_DEC as M_Q_VOL_DEC,	-- for Commodity spot/nearbyonly
    -- Commodity maturity
    case 
		when IND.M_CATEGORY=9 then CFI_MAT.M_LABEL	-- for future index: maturity
		when IND.M_RESET=6 then
			case
				when IND.M_COM_NBY_T=2 then IND.M_UECF -- for Index nearby: shifter
				when IND.M_COM_NBY_R=1 then 'Notice'	-- for future nearby: reference
				when IND.M_COM_NBY_R=0 then 'Expiry'
				else cast(IND.M_COM_NBY_R as char(10)) -- there should not be others
			end
		else null -- not relevant
    end as M_COM_MAT,
	-- Com Spot index fields
	-- Commodity location
	CMLOC.M_LABEL as M_COM_LOC,
	-- Commodity location time zone
	TZ.M_LABEL as M_LOC_TIMEZ,
	-- Commodity product type
	CMPTYPE.M_LABEL as M_COM_P_TYPE,
	-- Commodity product
	CMPROD.M_LABEL as M_COM_PROD
from
    RT_INDEX_DBF IND
	left join RT_GROUP_DBF RTG on IND.M_HISFILE = RTG.M_HISFILE -- reference to publication
	left join CM_UNIT_DBF IND_DUNIT on IND.M_UNIT_REF1 = IND_DUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for basket delivery unit
	left join CM_UNIT_DBF IND_QUNIT on IND.M_UNIT_REF0 = IND_QUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for basket quotation unit
	
	-- "Average" joins
	left join RT_INDEX_DBF AU_IND on IND.M_UNDRL = AU_IND.M_INDEX -- index table (underlying level)
	left join CMC_QUOT_DBF AU_QUOT on AU_IND.M_COM_QUOT = AU_QUOT.M_REFERENCE -- reference to quotation table
	left join CM_UNIT_DBF AU_DUNIT on AU_QUOT.M_QTY_UNIT = AU_DUNIT.M_REFERENCE -- reference to unit table for delivery unit
	left join CM_UNIT_DBF AU_QUNIT on AU_QUOT.M_UNIT = AU_QUNIT.M_REFERENCE -- reference to unit table for quotation unit

	-- "Future index" joins
	left join CM_FUT_DBF CMFUT on IND.M_COM_FUT=CMFUT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to underlying future (works for future index and nearby)
	left join CM_FMAT1_DBF CFI_MAT on IND.M_COM_MAT = CFI_MAT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to underlying future maturity
	left join CMC_QUOT_DBF CFI_QUOT on IND.M_COM_QUOT=CFI_QUOT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to underlying quotation (works for future index, nearby and com spot)
	left join CM_UNIT_DBF CFI_DUNIT on CFI_QUOT.M_QTY_UNIT = CFI_DUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for future index delivery unit
	left join CM_UNIT_DBF CFI_QUNIT on CFI_QUOT.M_UNIT = CFI_QUNIT.M_REFERENCE	-- reference to unit table for future index quotation unit
	left join CM_MKT_DBF CFI_PUB on CFI_QUOT.M_PUBLI=CFI_PUB.M_REFERENCE
	
	-- "Commodity spot index" joins
	left join CM_INDEX_DBF CMIND on IND.M_COM_IND=CMIND.M_REFERENCE
	left join CM_LOCAT_DBF CMLOC on CMIND.M_LOCATION = CMLOC.M_REFERENCE 
	left join DAT_TZONE_DBF TZ on CMLOC.M_TIME_ZONE = TZ.M_REFERENCE
	left join CM_PHYS_DBF CMPROD on CMIND.M_PHYSICAL = CMPROD.M_REFERENCE
	left join CM_PTYPE_DBF CMPTYPE on CMPROD.M_TYPE = CMPTYPE.M_REFERENCE

SECURITIES.REP      |select HEAD.M_SE_LABEL as M_SE_LABEL,HEAD.M_SE_CODE as M_SE_CODE, HEAD.M_SE_ISIN as M_SE_ISIN,  ROOT.M_SE_MARKET as M_SE_MARKET, HEAD.M_SE_D_LABEL as M_SE_D_LABEL, 
HEAD.M_SE_F_NAME as M_SE_F_NAME,HEAD.M_SE_COUP as M_SE_COUP,HEAD.M_SE_NISS as M_SE_NISS,HEAD.M_SE_NOUT as M_SE_NOUT
,CTRY.M_COUNTRY as M_COUNTRY,CTRY.M_AREA, HEAD.M_SE_SECTOR, SECTOR.M_LABEL as M_SECTOR_LBL,
HEAD.M_SE_MAT as M_SE_MAT, HEAD.M_SE_ISSD as M_SE_ISSD,
COUPON_VAL.M_LABEL as M_BT_COUPON, SECTOR_VAL.M_LABEL as M_BT_SECTOR,INDUSTRY_VAL.M_LABEL as M_BT_IND_TYP,
SECUDF.M_EQ_CODE AS M_UDF_EQCD, SECUDF.M_INV_TYPE AS M_UDF_INVTYP, SECUDF.M_BOND_TYPO AS M_UDF_BNDTYP
,CTRY.M_DESC as M_CTRY_DESC,HEAD.M_SE_GROUP,ROOT.M_SE_CUR,HEAD.M_SE_ISS,HEAD.M_SE_TYPE, ECH.M_DEF_UNIT, ECH.M_DEF_FREQ
--, LNGN.M_INDEX0 
from 
SE_HEAD_DBF HEAD, SE_ROOT_DBF ROOT , CR_CTRY_DBF CTRY, TRN_SECTOR_DBF SECTOR,
UTYPO_T_MAP_DBF COUPON_MAP, UTYPO_VAL_DBF COUPON_VAL,
UTYPO_T_MAP_DBF SECTOR_MAP, UTYPO_VAL_DBF SECTOR_VAL,
UTYPO_T_MAP_DBF INDUSTRY_MAP, UTYPO_VAL_DBF INDUSTRY_VAL,
TABLE#DATA#SECURITI_DBF SECUDF, RT_INDEX_DBF IDX, DAT_ECH_DBF ECH
, (SELECT SE_MKTOP_DBF.*, MAX(SE_MKTOP_DBF.M_SE_EVTIMP_REF) OVER (PARTITION BY M_SE_LABEL) AS MAX_EVT FROM SE_MKTOP_DBF) MKTOP
, BD_BOND_DBF BOND, RT_LNSEC_DBF LNSEC
, RT_INSGN_DBF INSGN, RT_LNGN_DBF LNGN 
where HEAD.M_SE_LABEL = ROOT.M_SE_LABEL and ROOT.M_SE_DE<>'Y'
and HEAD.M_SE_COUNTRY = CTRY.M_REFERENCE(+)
and HEAD.M_SE_SECTOR= SECTOR.M_REFERENCE(+)
and HEAD.M_REF_TYPE=COUPON_MAP.M_REF_TYPE(+) and 5=COUPON_MAP.M_REF_PROP(+)
and HEAD.M_REF_TYPE=SECTOR_MAP.M_REF_TYPE(+) and 16=SECTOR_MAP.M_REF_PROP(+)
and HEAD.M_REF_TYPE=INDUSTRY_MAP.M_REF_TYPE(+) and 11=INDUSTRY_MAP.M_REF_PROP(+)
and COUPON_MAP.M_REF_VAL=COUPON_VAL.M_REFERENCE(+)
and SECTOR_MAP.M_REF_VAL=SECTOR_VAL.M_REFERENCE(+)
and INDUSTRY_MAP.M_REF_VAL=INDUSTRY_VAL.M_REFERENCE(+)
and HEAD.M_SE_LABEL=SECUDF.M_SE_LABEL(+)
and HEAD.M_SE_LABEL = MKTOP.M_SE_LABEL (+)
and MKTOP.M_SE_INUM = BOND.M_BD_INUM (+)
and LNSEC.M_NB = BOND.M_BD_INUM 
and INSGN.M_GEN_NUM = LNSEC.M_GEN_NUM (+)
and LNGN.M_GEN_NUM = INSGN.M_GEN_NUM (+)
and LNGN.M_INDEX0 = IDX.M_INDEX (+)
and IDX.M_RAT_PERIOD = ECH.M_LABEL (+)
and MKTOP.M_SE_EVTIMP_REF = MKTOP.MAX_EVT
